prTitle: fix(tui): remove assistant message background paint on content rows (closes #142)
prBody:
## Summary

Ports upstream gsd-pi commit `d01b984` ("fix: remove TUI assistant background") to otto-cli as an **adapted port** (fix-strategy: adapted-port). Closes #142.

Upstream removed a `bodyBg: "customMessageBg"` card argument. otto-cli diverged: it painted the message background as an *outer* wrap inside `renderAssistantRail` (`transcript-design.ts:230`), which emitted a `\x1b[48;...` background ANSI escape on **every assistant content row**. That escape copy-pastes as garbage — the exact symptom upstream fixed.

## Change

- `packages/pi-coding-agent/src/modes/interactive/components/transcript-design.ts` — drop the `theme.bg("customMessageBg", line)` outer paint on assistant content rows; preserve the `indent` prefix and connector logic. `renderUserRail`'s `userMessageBg` is intentionally left untouched (out of scope).
- `packages/pi-coding-agent/src/modes/interactive/components/__tests__/assistant-message-design.test.ts` — capture the RAW (pre-`stripAnsi`) render and assert `doesNotMatch(raw[contentIndex], /\x1b\[48[;:]/)` so a background escape on the content row fails the test. Existing width contract (content/breathing rows length === 80) retained.

## Gates (all green)

- Regression test: red before fix, green after (pins root cause on raw output)
- Build: pass
- Targeted suite: pass
- Full suite (`npm test` → `npm run verify:pr`): pass
- Independent reviewer: approve (faithful adapted port, no scope creep, test pins root cause)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
issueBody:
> /cc @claude — auto-filed by `/upstream-cherry-pick`. Severity, labels, > conflict-risk, and the otto-cli implementation guidance below are populated > so the implementation phase can **confirm and apply** rather than start from > scratch. Pick this up via `/upstream-port-from-issue {{N}}` when ready. ## otto-cli implementation guidance verdict: manual-port # d01b984 — fix: remove TUI assistant background ## Target file(s) - packages/pi-coding-agent/src/modes/interactive/components/transcript-design.ts - packages/pi-coding-agent/src/modes/interactive/components/__tests__/assistant-message-design.test.ts ## Divergence Upstream removed `bodyBg: "customMessageBg"` from the `renderAssistantRail` call so the assistant message bubble no longer paints a background, and tightened the test to assert no 48;… background ANSI escape on the content row. The upstream commit lives in `packages/gsd-agent-modes/...` (post-seam-extraction) but otto-cli still has the equivalent file at `packages/pi-coding-agent/src/modes/interactive/components/transcript-design.ts`. Otto's `renderAssistantRail` (line 214) does not pass `bodyBg` into `copyCleanRoundedSurface` at all — it instead wraps the rendered surface in an outer `theme.bg("customMessageBg", line)` at line 230 (`renderedSurface = surface.map((line) => indent + theme.bg("customMessageBg", line))`). This is a different rendering strategy: otto paints the bg as an OUTER paint after the surface renders. The user-facing symptom upstream is fixing (orphan background ANSI on copy) likely manifests differently in otto. ## Concrete edits 1. Inspect rendered output of otto's assistant rail at width 80 — does line content still carry a `\x1b[48;…` background escape that copy-pastes as garbage? If yes, drop the `theme.bg("customMessageBg", line)` wrapping in `renderAssistantRail` (transcript-design.ts:230) so the surface returns clean lines. 2. Update or add an analogous test in `packages/pi-coding-agent/src/modes/interactive/components/__tests__/assistant-message-design.test.ts` asserting `assert.doesNotMatch(raw[contentIndex], /\x1b\[48[;:]/, ...)`. 3. Verify under otto's theme that any intentional bubble background is preserved at the border layer only (not on text rows), matching upstream's "fill the card interior" intent. ## Verdict Manual port. Functional intent (kill copy-unfriendly background paint on assistant content rows) is desirable for otto too, but the implementation site diverged: otto bg-paints in `renderAssistantRail` itself rather than via `cardSurface` `bodyBg`. A human needs to verify whether otto actually exhibits the same copy-paste symptom and then surgically remove the outer bg wrapping. Do not blindly cherry-pick — the upstream diff will not apply (path + structure differ).
Upstream diff (git show) ```diff commit d01b984deca845561e5934e707442c24b0f8dcc0 Author: Jeremy McSpadden Date: Sat May 30 15:52:53 2026 -0500 fix: remove TUI assistant background diff --git a/packages/gsd-agent-modes/src/modes/interactive/components/__tests__/assistant-message-design.test.ts b/packages/gsd-agent-modes/src/modes/interactive/components/__tests__/assistant-message-design.test.ts index 29661e3..e47001c 100644 --- a/packages/gsd-agent-modes/src/modes/interactive/components/__tests__/assistant-message-design.test.ts +++ b/packages/gsd-agent-modes/src/modes/interactive/components/__tests__/assistant-message-design.test.ts @@ -25,7 +25,8 @@ describe("AssistantMessageComponent open surface", () => { } as unknown as AssistantMessage; const component = new AssistantMessageComponent(message, true); - const plain = component.render(80).map((line) => stripAnsi(line)); + const raw = component.render(80); + const plain = raw.map((line) => stripAnsi(line)); const joined = plain.join("\n"); assert.match(joined, /GSD/); @@ -49,7 +50,8 @@ describe("AssistantMessageComponent open surface", () => { /^ {10,}/, `assistant content should not preserve the old outer rail indent:\n${joined}`, ); - assert.equal(plain[contentIndex].length, 80, `assistant content row should fill the bubble background:\n${joined}`); + assert.doesNotMatch(raw[contentIndex] ?? "", /\x1b\[48[;:]/, "assistant content rows should not paint a background"); + assert.equal(plain[contentIndex].length, 80, `assistant content row should fill the card interior:\n${joined}`); assert.doesNotMatch(plain[contentIndex], /[│┃╭╮╰╯]/, `content line must stay copy-clean:\n${joined}`); }); diff --git a/packages/gsd-agent-modes/src/modes/interactive/components/transcript-design.ts b/packages/gsd-agent-modes/src/modes/interactive/components/transcript-design.ts index 79016cf..b94c19d 100644 --- a/packages/gsd-agent-modes/src/modes/interactive/components/transcript-design.ts +++ b/packages/gsd-agent-modes/src/modes/interactive/components/transcript-design.ts @@ -288,7 +288,6 @@ export function renderAssistantRail( indent: 0, titleRight, railColor, - bodyBg: "customMessageBg", closeBottom: !opts.continuesToUser, }); let result = card; ```

The otto-cli targets are in the > implementation guidance section above, not here. - `packages/gsd-agent-modes/src/modes/interactive/components/__tests__/assistant-message-design.test.ts` - `packages/gsd-agent-modes/src/modes/interactive/components/transcript-design.ts` ## Suggested next steps ```sh # Inspect upstream change git -C ../gsd-pi show d01b984 # Attempt cherry-pick (only if guidance says paths align) git -C ../gsd-pi show d01b984 | git -C . am -3 # Or hand off to the port workflow /upstream-port-from-issue {{N}} ``` --- Auto-filed on 2026-06-05 by the upstream-cherry-pick skill.
